features: EVERYDAY ESSENTIAL: Cotton Tree large pack of 120 ready to use cotton wool pads are suitable for everyday use for cleansing or moisturising all skins types, perfect for delicate or sensitive skin
ADD FRAGRANCE: Add a few cotton wool balls to a small bowl, sprinkle with your favourite essential oil, place the bowl in a room or cupboard for a quick inexpensive fragrance diffuser
NATURAL COTTON: Hypoallergenic, made from 100 Percentpure natural cotton, perfect for daily use

GENTLE CLEANSING: Always use a cleanser made to remove makeup, apply as directed. Take care around the eye, the skin is thinner, do not pull or rub. Apply and leave as cleanser directsto help dissolve makeup,making it easier and gentler on the skin to remove. Rubbing at the skin can irritate.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Convenient ready to use pack of 120 round cotton wool pads.
description: Product Description otton Treelarge pack of 120 ready to use cotton wool pads are suitable for everyday use for cleansing or moisutrising all skins types, perfect for delicate or sensitive skin. Hypoallergenic, made from 100 Percentpure natural cotton, perfect for daily use. Cotton wool balls can also be used to make a quick inexpensive fragrance diffuser, add a few cotton wool balls to a small bowl, sprinkle with your favourite essential oil, place the bowl in a room or cupboard. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. May cause skin irritation. Always use a cleanser made to remove makeup and follow instructions carefully.
